description: Composition Maroon and green kurta made of a blended fabric, has ethnic print, V-neck with gold and maroon embroidery extending to the waist, three-quarter net sleeves in maroon with shimmery gold border cuffs and a gold border on the hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only This piece of art by aneri is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics Product is a size S on a model of height-5.7", Chest-33" and Waist-26"
